cleanup.title: Cleanup
cleanup.subtitle: Remove stale anonymous data and expired tokens.
cleanup.reasonPlaceholder: Why this cleanup is being run
cleanup.policyHelp: Soft-deletes stale anonymous rows, hard-purges rows past the grace window, and removes expired share tokens. Same code path the background worker runs.
cleanup.confirmPolicy: This applies the configured retention windows to all eligible rows. Hard-purges are irreversible. Continue?
cleanup.lastRunSummary: Last run — counters: soft {{cs}} / hard {{ch}}, tournaments: soft {{ts}} / hard {{th}}, tokens: {{tok}}.
cleanup.expiredTokensHelp: Deletes share tokens whose expiry has passed or that have been revoked.
cleanup.sampleHelp: Up to 50 oldest candidates shown. Untick rows you want to keep.
cleanup.confirmHardPurge: Hard-purge {{count}} row(s)? This cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences.
settings.languageHelp: Pick the language used across the app.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.message: You don't have permission to view this page.

apiErrors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
apiErrors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
apiErrors.rateLimitedRetry: Too many requests. Please retry in {{seconds}}s.
apiErrors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Signing you in again…

sport.bestOfSets: Best of {{total}} sets · {{points}} pts to win

rules.beachAutoSwitch: Beach: auto-switch sides at point milestones
rules.timeoutsHelp: FIVB defaults: indoor volleyball 2 × 30 s, beach volleyball 1 × 30 s. Set count to 0 to disable timeouts.
rules.beachAutoHelp: On: server switches automatically every 7 points (5 in the deciding set), with a 5-second notification. Off: you'll be asked to confirm each switch.

counter.newSubtitle: Choose a sport and name your teams to get started.
counter.resumeHelp: You already have a counter running. Sign in to keep more than one at a time.
counter.myShortcutHelp: View, resume or delete your existing counters.
counter.createError: Failed to create counter. Please try again.

list.title: My Counters
list.emptySubtitle: Create your first counter to track a match.
list.deleteMessage: "{{a}} vs {{b}}" will be removed. This can't be undone from here.

page.notFoundMessage: This counter doesn't exist or you don't have access.
page.endMatchMessage: The match will be marked finished. The winner will be the team with more sets — or, on a tie, more total points.
page.deleteMessage: "{{a}} vs {{b}}" and its history will be removed. This can't be undone.

sideSwitchAuto.title: Switch sides?
sideSwitchAuto.message: The points total just hit a switch boundary. Have the teams switched sides?

sideSwitchEndSet.title: Switch sides
sideSwitchEndSet.message: End of set — teams must switch sides before the next set begins. Confirm when done.

sideSwitchInfo.title: Sides switched
sideSwitchInfo.message: Teams just switched sides — court change required.

join.invalidMessage: This share link is invalid or has expired.

live.accessDenied: Live updates are blocked for this counter. You can stay on the page, but the score will not refresh automatically.
live.unavailable: Live updates are temporarily unavailable. You can stay on the page, but the score will not refresh automatically.

empty.title: No tournaments yet
empty.subtitle: Create your first tournament to bracket your teams.

name.label: Tournament name
name.help: Pick a short, memorable name — you can change it later.

sport.label: Sport
sport.help: Determines the default match rules. You can override them in settings after creating.

format.label: Format
format.help: Choose how matches are organised. Knockouts decide a champion fast; round-robin gives everyone equal play time.

groups.groupsHelp: Number of round-robin groups before the knockout.
groups.advanceHelp: How many teams from each group qualify for the bracket.
groups.constraint: (Groups × advance) must be a power of two — e.g. 2×2 = 4, 2×4 = 8, 4×2 = 8.
groups.invalid: Groups × advance must be a power of two and at least 2.

detail.shareFailed: Could not copy — paste the page URL manually.
detail.startHelpMin: Add at least {{min}} teams to start.
detail.bracketEmpty: Bracket will appear once the tournament is started.
detail.settingsLocked: Only the organiser can change settings.
detail.standingsEmpty: Standings appear once matches start completing.

participants.emptyMin: Add at least {{min}} teams to start the bracket.

advanced.help: By default, teams play in the order they were added. Use the options below for finer control.
advanced.seedHelp: Lower numbers play higher numbers in the bracket. Leave blank to let the order be decided automatically.
advanced.shuffleHelp: Random order for any team without a manual seed — fair when you don't want registration time to influence the bracket.

singleelimination.label: Single elimination
singleelimination.description: Knockout bracket — lose once and you're out.

doubleelimination.label: Double elimination
doubleelimination.description: Two-loss elimination with a winners and losers bracket.

roundrobin.label: Round robin
roundrobin.description: Everyone plays everyone — ranked by wins.

groupstageelimination.label: Group stage + knockout
groupstageelimination.description: Round-robin in groups, then the top finishers fight in a bracket.

settings.name: Name
settings.singleSetHint: Single-set indoor mode? Set sets to win = 1 and total sets = 1.
